Stone has successfully performed zone change operations on the VK 817, OCS-G-09743, Well A-8ST to produce the "C" Sand.  Operations began and ended on February 18, 2009.  The previous producing interval, the "D" Sand was isolated by shifting the sliding sleeve closed @ 4211' MD (3949' WLM) and setting a "XX" plug in the nipple @ 4032' MD.  A sliding sleeve was opened @ 3372' MD (3286' WLM), exposing the existing "C" Sand to production.
The wellbore has been P&A'd.

Stone successfully performed zone change operations on the EI 166, Well #001ST to produce the "D2" Sand.  Operations began on May 14, 2009 and ended on May 18, 2009.  The previous producing interval, the "D3" sand reservoir, perfs 15182' - 15190' & 15196' - 15198', was isolated by setting a MRBP @ 15145' and dumping 25' cmt on top of the plug, ETOC @ 15120'.  Stone then exposed the "D2" Sand to production by perforating from 15016' - 15032'.  The well is currently shut-in while waiting on repairs to the SCSSV, as well as the platform and production facilities.
